steps.description: First , to pay (i) pari passu and pro rata according to the respective amounts thereof, any Expenses (to the extent that amounts standing to the credit of the Expenses Account have been insufficient to pay such costs during the immediately preceding Interest Period) and (ii) to credit into the Expenses Account such an amount as will bring the balance of such account up to (but not in excess of) the Retention Amount;

post_enforcement.source_section: 7.2 Post Trigger Notice Priority of Payments

triggers.name: principal_deficiency_ledger_trigger
triggers.description: A debit balance on the Principal Deficiency Ledger (PDL) triggers a diversion of funds from the interest waterfall to cure the shortfall.
triggers.consequence: Interest Available Funds are used to reduce the debit balance on the Principal Deficiency Ledger to zero.

citation.excerpt: ...in or towards making good any shortfall reflected in the Principal Deficiency Ledger until the debit balance, if any, of the Principal Deficiency Ledger is reduced to zero...

triggers.name: event_of_default_trigger
triggers.description: Upon an event of default as defined in Condition 13.2, a Trigger Notice is served, which alters the priority of payments to the Post-Trigger Notice waterfall, accelerating payments.
triggers.consequence: The Priority of Payments switches to the Post Trigger Notice Priority of Payments, accelerating payments to senior noteholders.

citation.page_or_row: 7.2 Post Trigger Notice Priority of Payments
citation.excerpt: Following the delivery of a Trigger Notice under Rated Notes Condition 13.2 ( Delivery of Trigger Notice )... the Issuer Available Funds... will be applied...

triggers.name: clean_up_call_option
triggers.description: The Issuer has the option to redeem the Notes early, which leads to the application of the Post Trigger Notice Priority of Payments.
triggers.consequence: The Issuer may opt for an early redemption of the Notes, leading to the application of the Post Trigger Notice Priority of Payments.

citation.excerpt: ...in the event that the Issuer opts for an early redemption of the Notes under Rated Notes Condition 9.3 ( Optional redemption )...
citation.page_or_row: 7.2 Post Trigger Notice Priority of Payments

issuer_covenants: The corporate object of the Issuer as contained in its by-laws is limited and the Issuer has also agreed to certain covenants in the Intercreditor Agreement and the Conditions restricting the activities that may be carried out by the Issuer.
The Issuer has covenanted not to enter into any transactions that are not contemplated in the Transaction Documents.
